title: The Association
description: Three HOA notices in one day. The party considers its compliance posture.

steps.text: Three notices arrived today. The party has not told the Association where it sleeps.

lines.speaker: Mage
lines.text: Form 12-B: 'Unregistered Weaponry (Decorative?)'. They think the swords are decorative.

lines.speaker: Cleric
lines.text: The fine print says noncompliance is 'community-addressed'. What does that mean?

lines.speaker: Fighter
lines.text: It means we keep the tent packed.

lines.speaker: Bard
lines.text: I filed an appeal. In ballad form. We'll know by Thursday.
